executives.name: Abby Khandelwal
executives.background: Mr. Khandelwal joined B2Gold in 2024 as Chief Financial Officer. He previously served as CFO of Pretium Resources Inc.

executives.name: Jeane Hull
executives.background: Ms. Hull was formerly the EVP and Chief Technical Officer of Peabody Energy. She has extensive experience in engineering and operations.

executives.name: Ken Konkin
executives.background: Mr. Konkin is a Professional Geologist with over 35 years of experience in exploration and mining. He was instrumental in the discovery of the Valley of the Kings deposit at Pretium Resources Inc. and has worked extensively in the Golden Triangle of British Columbia.

executives.name: Jacques Perron
executives.background: Former President and CEO of Pretium Resources Inc. and Thompson Creek Metals Company.

board_of_directors.name: Jeane Hull
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Hull was formerly the EVP and Chief Technical Officer of Peabody Energy. She has extensive experience in engineering and operations.
